entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A company, institution, or other organized body.

entity_types.name: Product
entity_types.description: A good or service developed and offered by an organization.

entity_types.name: FundingRound
entity_types.description: A specific instance of an organization raising capital.

entity_types.name: LegalCase
entity_types.description: A dispute between parties brought before a court of law.

entity_types.name: Policy
entity_types.description: A course or principle of action adopted or proposed by a government, party, business, or individual.

entity_types.name: GovernmentBody
entity_types.description: An official organization that is part of a country's government.
examples: United States Securities and Exchange Commission

entity_types.name: Technology
entity_types.description: A specific tool, system, or method developed from scientific knowledge for practical purposes.

entity_types.name: Event
entity_types.description: A significant occurrence or happening, often with a specific date or duration.

relation_groups.name: Organizational Structure
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the internal and external structure of organizations, including founding, employment, and leadership roles.

relations.name: founds
relations.detail: A person who establishes an organization.

relations.name: employs
relations.detail: An organization that has a person working for it.

relations.name: leads
relations.detail: A person who holds a leadership position within an organization.

relations.name: is_headquartered_at
relations.detail: The primary administrative location of an organization.

relations.name: has_division
relations.detail: An organization that contains a specific division or subsidiary.

relation_groups.name: Corporate Transactions
relation_groups.description: Relations detailing financial and strategic interactions between organizations, such as investments, acquisitions, and partnerships.

relations.name: invests_in
relations.detail: An organization that provides capital to another organization.

relations.name: acquires
relations.detail: An organization that purchases another organization or its assets.

relations.name: partnered_with
relations.detail: An organization that collaborates with another organization.

relations.name: holds_stake_in
relations.detail: An organization that owns a percentage of another organization.

relations.name: raises_funding_from
relations.detail: An organization that secures capital through a funding round.

relation_groups.name: Product & Technology
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the development, release, and evolution of products and technologies.

relations.name: develops
relations.detail: An organization that creates a product.

relations.name: releases
relations.detail: An organization that makes a product available to the public.

relations.name: uses
relations.detail: An organization that utilizes a product.

relations.name: is_version_of
relations.detail: A product that is a specific iteration or variant of another product.

relations.name: is_based_on
relations.detail: A product that is built upon a specific technology.

relation_groups.name: Legal and Regulatory Actions
relation_groups.description: Relations concerning legal disputes, regulatory compliance, and official designations.

relations.name: sues
relations.detail: An organization that initiates legal action against another organization.

relations.name: alleges_violation_by
relations.detail: A legal case that claims an organization has committed a violation.

relations.name: rules_on
relations.detail: A person who makes a judicial decision in a legal case.

relations.name: designates_as
relations.detail: A government body that officially classifies an organization with a specific status.

relations.name: challenges
relations.detail: An organization that disputes or opposes a policy.

relation_groups.name: Government and Policy Interactions
relation_groups.description: Relations describing interactions between organizations and government bodies, including contracts, restrictions, and policy adherence.

relations.name: contracts_with
relations.detail: An organization that enters into an agreement with a government body.

relations.name: imposes_restriction_on
relations.detail: A government body that places limitations on an organization.

relations.name: adheres_to
relations.detail: An organization that follows a specific policy.

relations.name: supports
relations.detail: An organization that advocates for a specific policy.

relations.name: uses_in
relations.detail: A product that is deployed or utilized in a specific geographical area.

relation_groups.name: Research and Development
relation_groups.description: Relations pertaining to the methods, frameworks, and findings of research activities.

relations.name: researches
relations.detail: An organization that conducts studies on a specific policy or concept.

relations.name: applies_method
relations.detail: A product that utilizes a specific method or technique.

relations.name: publishes_findings_on
relations.detail: An organization that releases research results related to a technology.

relations.name: influences
relations.detail: A policy that shapes the development or behavior of a product.

relation_groups.name: Events and Milestones
relation_groups.description: Relations describing significant occurrences, their timing, and participants.

relations.name: involves
relations.detail: An event that includes or affects a specific organization.

relations.name: announces
relations.detail: An organization that makes a public declaration about an event.
